content.headline: Pensacola High Future Business Leaders of America
content.subheadline: Developing the next generation of business professionals and community leaders.

announcement.title: Next Meeting — Aug 20 · Club Rush Recruitment and General Meeting
announcement.body: We're recruiting at Club Rush! Then at the General Meeting bring a friend, grab Krispy Kreme, and pick up your FBLA Connect login. See the NLC recap also!

cta.title: Ready to Compete at the National Level?
cta.body: Join Pensacola High FBLA and start your journey to the National Leadership Conference. Past members have earned scholarships and launched careers.

about.title: Pensacola High FBLA
about.body: Developing the next generation of business professionals and community leaders.

study.ctaDesc: Not sure which event to compete in yet? Browse the full list of FBLA high school competitive events to find the one that fits your interests and strengths, then dive into the study resources below.

events.title: Officer Meeting
events.desc: Officers plan the upcoming school year. All officers required.

events.title: General Meeting and Club Rush
events.desc: Recruit at Club Rush! Encourage friends to come to the New Member Meeting. NLC recap & FBLA Connect setup. Krispy Kreme.

events.title: New Member Meeting
events.desc: Intro to FBLA: events, dress code, and how to succeed. Speed-dating icebreaker. Pizza provided.

events.title: General Meeting — Buddy Pairing
events.desc: Expectations, buddy pairing, event types overview, and Adopt-a-Freshie. Food after the meeting.

events.title: SFLC
events.desc: State Fall Leadership Conference. Selected members compete and represent PHS FBLA.

events.title: Thanksgiving Meeting
events.desc: Thankful Thanksgiving theme. Make sure members show up to upcoming workshops. Costco acorn cookies.

events.title: General Meeting — DLC Info
events.desc: Mr. Hill presents DLC details. Gift exchange and Christmas Little Debbie Cakes.

events.title: Study Night Workshop
events.desc: Prejudged event review session. Study time with officer feedback. Starts at 12:30.

events.title: District Leadership Conference
events.desc: DLC competition day. All competing members must attend.

events.title: SLC Money Due
events.desc: Payment deadline for State Leadership Conference. Sandy Sansing speaker. Hot cocoa & Oreos.

events.title: FBLA Week!
events.desc: Week-long celebration of Future Business Leaders of America across the school.

events.title: Judging Practice Workshop
events.desc: Practice presentations with judge feedback to prepare for SLC.

events.title: SLC Prep Meeting
events.desc: Mr. Hill talks SLC strategy. Study time and officer feedback. Chips provided.

events.title: State Leadership Conference
events.desc: Compete at the Florida state level in Orlando. Top performers advance to NLC.

events.title: Officer Elections
events.desc: Chapter elections for the 2027–2028 officer team. All members vote.

events.title: End-of-Year Meeting
events.desc: Celebrate the year's achievements. Tentative date — details to follow.

descriptions: For testing, see objective test information and files.
For practice prompts, see the objective test mega folder.
